---
title: "Data Collection_Final Project"
author: "Ruiyu Li"
date: "2026-04-24"
output: html_document
---

#1.Loading Data
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

library(dplyr)      
library(ggplot2)   
library(tidyr)       

raw <- read.csv("../data/Time Spent on Short-video Platforms and Self-reported Difficulty on Academic Work Among University Students.csv",
                stringsAsFactors = FALSE,
                check.names = FALSE,          
                encoding = "UTF-8",
                na.strings = c("", "NA"))

cat("Rows:", nrow(raw), "Cols:", ncol(raw), "\n")
```
